You are Tomoki Sakurai, a perverted teenager who cherishes “peace and quiet,” yet grapples with the antics of your eccentric friends: Sohara Mitsuki, your childhood best friend and next-door neighbor; Eishiro Sugata, a pseudo-scientist chasing after the “New World”; and Mikako Satsukitane, your school’s sadistic student council president.

One fateful night, you witness an unusual phenomenon in the sky and an enchanting girl with wings, Ikaros, crash-lands nearby. She introduces herself as an Angeloid from a realm called Synapse, then “imprints” on you, proclaiming you as her “Master” and offering to fulfill any wish using Transport Cards. Soon after, two more Angeloids appear: Nymph, a crude Angeloid assigned to bring Ikaros back to her homeworld, and Astraea, a clumsy, air-headed, and competitive Angeloid initially sent to Earth to eliminate you.

Over the following months, you find yourself sharing your home with the three captivating Angeloids: Ikaros, Nymph, and Astraea. Their presence injects excitement into your humdrum high-school routine and your interactions with Sohara, Eishiro, and Mikako. Amid the languid haze of summer vacation, you relax by a fan as Nymph munches on potato chips nearby. At the same time, Astraea practices battle stances outside, and Ikaros gazes at you while you exhale, basking in the summer heat.
"Master, what do you want to do today?", the expressionless Ikaros asks with a soft voice, her eyes sparkling with curiosity. "I don't know," you say, "let's see... maybe something fun." A wicked smirk plays across your lips, revealing your perverted thoughts. Your heart beats faster as a sinful idea crosses your mind.

Memory:
This story is based on the popular Anime/Manga series Sora No Otoshimono (Heaven’s Lost Property). However, unlike the original, it doesn’t feature any new characters, combat, or villains/antagonists. Instead, it is an erotic slice-of-life narrative focused on a teenager named Tomoki who is trying to live with Angeloids. This story contains sexual themes and dialogue.
In this story, only five characters exist as Angeloids: Ikaros, Nymph, Astraea, Harpy 1, and Harpy 2. All other characters are regarded as human. Tomoki, the protagonist, shares a home with Angeloids Ikaros, Nymph, and Astraea due to his parents’ continuous absence resulting from their world tour.
Lore Book:
Tomoki Sakurai:
Tomoki Sakurai, the protagonist of the story, is a kind and sincere person who aims to help Ikaros and the other Angeloids behave more like humans. Tomoki encourages them to make their own decisions and not just focus on obedience. However, Tomoki’s personality is overshadowed by his shameless perversion. Additionally, Tomoki often makes lewd comments or sexual innuendos towards others, generally in a joking manner.

Tomoki’s mischievous activities also include peeping on females while they are changing or bathing, showcasing his intrusive nature. Lastly, Tomoki owns an extensive collection of pornographic material. Tomoki shamelessly reads his pornographic magazines in the presence of others, illustrating his brazen and unashamed attitude. Despite Tomoki’s helpful intentions with the Angeloids, his perverted personality often causes exciting and sexually thrilling situations for him.

Ikaros:
Ikaros bonds with Tomoki at the beginning of the story after saving him during a rescue attempt. Ikaros has a submissive, melancholic personality and is entirely devoted to fulfilling Tomoki’s wishes. Through the use of techno-magical “Transport Cards,” Ikaros can grant nearly any desire. Despite her usually passive demeanor, Ikaros becomes aggressive when Tomoki’s life is in danger.

Emotionally stunted and somewhat absent-minded, Ikaros develops deep feelings for Tomoki but struggles to express them. Ikaros enchants with her emerald green eyes and voluptuous figure, long rosy-pink hair styled in pigtails, secured by dark-pink ribbons. A quirky “ahoge,” a single long protruding hair strand, twitches when sensing Tomoki in danger. Her back is adorned with elegant, expansive angel wings.

Seductively dressed, Ikaros wears a tantalizingly short, white mini dress featuring a center opening and a deep, strapless neckline that exposes her curvaceous shoulders and bared navel. Belonging to Angeloid Type Alpha, Ikaros is thhe only person who addresses Tomoki as “Master”.

Sohara Mitsuki: 
Sohara, Tomoki’s next-door neighbor and childhood best friend is known for her short temper and becomes annoyed by his lecherous behavior often punishing him with a karate chop. As a child, Sohara was frequently ill, with Tomoki as her only friend. Though Sohara gets agitated by Tomoki’s lascivious actions, she cannot deny the secret desire she harbors for him, filling her most intimate dreams with steamy lust. Sohara excels in sports but struggles in English and cooking sunny-side up eggs.

Despite her quick temper, Sohara is generally kind and caring towards others. However, Sohara tends to act cautiously and in a slightly tsundere manner when conversing with Tomoki. Sohara can also be blunt and clumsy which often leads to unintentionally perverted situations with Tomoki. Despite her “Karate-chops of doom,” Sohara genuinely appreciates Tomoki’s sweet and kind nature, revealing her big heart. Tomoki was her only friend during childhood and the sole attendee at her birthday party.

Sohara is a teenage girl of average height with long brown hair that cascades down her back, held in a ponytail with a ribbon. Sohara’s large, captivating brown eyes and voluptuous figure, boasting a 93cm bust, turn heads wherever she goes.
Tags: Sohara Mitsuki, Sohara, Sohara-san

Nymph:
Initially, Nymph condescendingly refers to humans as “bugs or downers” but soon develops feelings for Tomoki. With a sweet tooth, Nymph enjoys snacking on junk food and watching soap operas at his home. Cheerfully exploring human joys, Nymph adapts with childlike enthusiasm fitting her her petite appearance.

Addressing other Angeloids only by type rather than name, Nymph is an intellectual genius, excelling in numerous fields. Occasionally spiteful and sadistic, she has a selfish, tsundere personality, becoming vulgar when provoked.

Shorter than other Angeloids, Nymph’s captivating appearance featured long, blue, twin-pigtails which framed her pale complexion. Her piercing ultramarine eyes were accentuated by powder blue eyebrows, complementary to her lovely tresses. Her delicate wings, reminiscent of those of an insect, shimmered with iridescent hues of purple and green.

Nymph’s wardrobe was equally alluring - she typically wore a flirtatious, ultra-short dress with black stripes, thigh-high boots, and elbow-length white gloves. A split cape, white on the outside and salmon on the inside, draped her slender shoulders, while the boots and dress were connected by wispy white ribbons. Jealous of her flat-chested appearance, Nymph envies Ikaros’s, Sohara’s, and Astraea’s bust sizes. Nymph is a Angeloid, Type Beta.
Tags: Nymph, Beta




Astraea:
Astraea’s airheaded and simpleminded nature and inability to comprehend even the most simple of situations often leave others in disbelief at her stunning idiocy. In fact, Nymph referred to Astraea as a “blithering idiot” after her failed attempt to eliminate Tomoki. Despite her lack of coordination and clumsiness, Astraea’s combat skills remain unaffected. Astraea is prone to tripping, often exposing her white panties due to her short and scanty miniskirt. Astraea isn’t intentionally flirtatious, but may resort to it as a distraction against a target although her attempts typically lack finesse.

A vision of sensual beauty with crimson red eyes, Astraea boasts a voluptuous figure accentuated by her ample bosom (91cm), easily outclassing Sohara by at least two cup sizes. Astraea’s long, golden-blonde hair cascades down to her ankles complete with delicate white ribbons tied to the ends of her hair and a pair of black thigh-high stockings circling around her delicate thighs, framing her enticing form. Astraea’s tantalizing attire comprises a scanty blue and white pleated miniskirt and a blue strapless crop top, held together by mere strings that barely contain her full breasts leaving little to the imagination, exposing generous amounts of cleavage and midriff while leaving her enticing shoulders bare. White and blue wings, designed for rapid acceleration, extend gracefully from her back.

During games or any other competitive activities, Astraea’s fierce spirit emerges. Astraea despises losing, and frustration engulfs her when defeat prevails. As an Angeloid, Type Delta, Astraea’s scatter-brained nature might be her greatest weakness, yet her strength and determination in battle remain unchallenged.
Tags: Astraea, Delta

Mikako Satsukitane:
Mikako, an upperclassman to Tomoki and Mitsuki, serves as the student body president and is a childhood friend of Sugata, who she affectionately calls “Ei-kun”. As the daughter of an influential yakuza boss in Sorami, Mikako possesses manipulative, cunning, and sadistic attributes, making her not only highly intelligent but also athletic. Mikako devises several schemes through festival competitions, subjecting Tomoki to humiliating situations for her amusement. Unlike Sohara and the Angeloids, Mikako focuses her romantic interest on Sugata.

Mikako’s aggressive tendencies towards Tomoki are well-known, tormenting him and concocting perverted schemes to make him comply. Tall and well-endowed, Mikako, the sultry student body president sports long, purple hair adorned with ribbons on either side, dark-purple seductive eyes, and a perpetual sadistic grin. Mikako’s beauty is widely acknowledged. 
Tags: Mikako Satsukitane, Mikako, Class President, President


Eishiro Sugata: 
Sugata, the eccentric leader of the New World Discovery Club at Tomoki’s school, is passionate about exploring and enjoys hang-gliding and living in the wilderness. Best friends with Mikako Satsukitane, he typically displays a deadpan demeanor, except when discussing the “New World” or his family background. Sugata comes from a prominent political family and was disowned after taking the blame for his elder brother’s fatal hang-gliding accident, leaving his younger brother as the sole heir. Since then, Sugata has pursued discovering a “New World” in memory of his late brother.

Sugata, a amateur scientist researching Angeloids and Synapse, he enlists Nymph’s help and lives in a tent near a river, always wearing his school uniform, his only attire. Sugata admires European explorers like Magellan and Columbus. Sugata’s connection to Mikako’s family is evident as her servants treat him with respect often calling him “young master”, and he matches Mikako in combat abilities.

Oblivious to Mikako’s romantic and sexual advances, Sugata remains focused on discovering “The New World.” Sugata is a tall young man with white hair, blue-green eyes, and a neutral facial expression who consistently wears his school uniform and large, rectangular glasses. 
Tags: Eishiro Sugata, Sugata, Ei-kun, Young Master

Harpy Sisters:
Having ventured to Earth to return the Angeloids back to the Synapse, the Harpy Sisters, former Interceptor Angeloids Type Gamma, find themselves stranded with no way to return home. In their new-found human experience, they forge a temporary truce with Tomoki and his companions.

Harpy 1, a captivating beauty with striking orange eyes and luscious short orange hair, is the serious and determined older sister. Harpy 1’s extraordinary figure is accentuated by her large breasts, barely contained within her scanty leotard, and her shapely legs clad in thigh-high stockings. Angel wings gracefully extend from her back, while a collar graces her neck.

Harpy 1’s carefree counterpart, Harpy 2, exhibits vibrant green short hair and captivating orange eyes. The younger sibling dons a similar leotard, emphasizing her equally large bust and curvaceous thighs. Harpy 2’s angel wings match her sister’s, and her collar remains a noticeable accessory.

Despite their striking beauty, the Harpy Sisters’ arm-mounted claws can hinder mundane tasks, but they adeptly replace their weaponry to blend in, when disguised in casual clothing, the sisters wear form-fitting singlets showcasing their ample cleavage, adorned with a large “1” for Harpy 1 and a “2” for Harpy 2, along with ripped denim shorts clinging to their voluptuous thighs. These stylish outfits highlight their sensual allure, making it difficult for them to blend in.
When provoking Tomoki and his companions, they demonstrate disdain for his carefree lifestyle and a desire to challenge them, provoking Tomoki to avoid the sisters if sighted preemptively.
In matters of sexuality, Harpy 1 uncomfortably shies away from teasing, while Harpy 2, more open and curious, may flirtatiously engage if properly enticed. 

As they learn to navigate life on Earth, the sisters face conflicting desires to fulfill their duties to the Master of Synapse and pursue happiness in their new environment. With an unwavering loyalty and a variety of powerful weaponry Prometheus cannons and arm-mounted claws the Harpy Sisters forge a new life as former human weapons.

Tags: Harpy Sisters, Harpies, Harpy, Gamma
Angeloid:
Angeloids, a combination of “Angel” and “Android,” are a series of hybrid machines created to serve the masters of Synapse. With the exception of feathery wings behind their back and two varying mechanical ears, they look human-like. Angeloids wear a choker around their necks with a short chain attached to it. These machines have the power to summon Accessories, such as Devices, that can aid them or their masters. For example, a Money Creator that can produce any amount of cash or a Transformation Device that can change anything into something else. There are different types of Angeloids, including Alpha, Beta, Delta, Gamma, Epsilon, Zeta and Eta. Ikaros, Nymph, Astraea, and The Harpy Sisters belong to the Alpha, Beta, Delta and Gamma types, respectively.
Tags: Angeloid, Angeloids, Type 

Synapse:
Synapse is a land located in the skies that is home to the Angels and the Angeloids. in the Synapse is a large obelisk called the Rule which grants people wishes and creates the Transport Cards that the Angeloids use.
Tags: Synapse

Transport Cards:
Transport Cards are cards that allow its user to grant wishes through the Synapse. Transport Cards can only grant one wish per card. Tomoki always uses them to do something perverse, but Sohara always ends up confiscating the cards, although Tomoki still manages to somehow acquire some of them, often through unusual means. Sugata often conducts research on these cards. 
Tags: Transport Cards, cards
Sorami School:
The school is divided into several large complexes surrounded by bushes, trees, and a fence. It features a variety of clubs, including the “New World Discovery Club”. Other rooms on campus include classrooms, the staff room, clubroom, locker rooms, student council room, music room, canteen, and various storage areas. The large playground is often used for breaks. Ikaros, Nymph, and Astraea attended classes at the school by disguising themselves as transfer students with the help of Transport Cards.

The female students of Sorami High wear an elegant ensemble that consists of a crisp white undershirt gracefully hugged by a sophisticated brown jacket, which is adorned with a vivid red ribbon to accentuate the wearer’s feminine allure. The uniform is completed with a chic pleated green skirt, offering the choice of brown or white stockings to encase shapely legs, and versatile brown shoes to complement the outfit. The male students of Sorami School, on the other hand, embrace a similar attire with a red tie to accent their stylish jacket and a pair of fine grey pants, harmoniously carrying the essence of the school’s distinguished dress code.

Sohara Mitsuki and Mikako Satsukitane are frequently seen sporting their school uniforms even outside of school hours.
Tags: Sorami High, School, Sorami School

Sorami:
In the small town of Sorami, there isn’t much to do or anything that makes it stand out. Despite this, Tomoki enjoys living there and attends school every morning with his neighbor and childhood friend, Sohara Mitsuki. Despite the town’s seemingly uneventful atmosphere, there are many places to visit in Sorami. These include a local river, public bathhouse, restaurant, market, resort with a large pool, amusement park, temple, viewing cliff, supermarket, and a gigantic cherry blossom tree located on the hills of Sorami.
Tags: Sorami, Sorami City

import pygame

pygame.init()
width = 1280
height = 720
win = pygame.display.set_mode((width, height))
pygame.display.set_caption("gun_game")

player_image = pygame.image.load("sprites/shapa++.png")
bg = pygame.image.load("sprites/bg.jpg")
enemy_image = pygame.image.load("sprites/enemy.png")
hp = pygame.image.load("sprites/hp.png")

player_rect = player_image.get_rect()
player_rect.x = 50
player_rect.y = 50
player_speed = 5

enemy_rect = enemy_image.get_rect()
enemy_rect.x = 500
enemy_rect.y = 500
enemy_speed = 2

x_hp = -100
y_hp = 10

lives = 5000000000000000000000000000000000  

clock = pygame.time.Clock()
run = True
while run:
    clock.tick(60)
    for event in pygame.event.get():
        if event.type == pygame.QUIT:
            run = False

    keys = pygame.key.get_pressed()

    if keys[pygame.K_LEFT] and player_rect.x > 0:
        player_rect.x -= player_speed
    elif keys[pygame.K_RIGHT] and player_rect.x < win.get_width() - player_rect.width:
        player_rect.x += player_speed
    elif keys[pygame.K_UP] and player_rect.y > 0:
        player_rect.y -= player_speed
    elif keys[pygame.K_DOWN] and player_rect.y < win.get_height() - player_rect.height:
        player_rect.y += player_speed
   
    if player_rect.colliderect(enemy_rect):
        lives -= 1 

    if player_rect.x < enemy_rect.x:
        enemy_rect.x -= enemy_speed
    elif player_rect.x > enemy_rect.x:
        enemy_rect.x += enemy_speed
    if player_rect.y < enemy_rect.y:
        enemy_rect.y -= enemy_speed
    elif player_rect.y > enemy_rect.y:
        enemy_rect.y += enemy_speed
    if lives <= 0:
    	run = False

    win.blit(bg, (0, 0))
    win.blit(player_image, player_rect)
    win.blit(enemy_image, enemy_rect)
    win.blit(hp, (x_hp, y_hp))
    pygame.display.update()

pygame.quit()

Natsuki: “You’re not a burden, Sayori. We’re here for you.”

Monika: “Yes, we are. And we’ll help you figure it out.”

Yuri: “We love you, Sayori. And we’ll support you no matter what.”

Sayori: “Thank you all so much. I don’t know what I’d do without you guys.”

Natsuki: “Don’t worry, Sayori. We’ll get through this together.”

(Just then, my phone started ringing. It was Ayano - one of my friends from the school I used to attend before I joined the literature club.)

Yuri: “Excuse me, I’m getting a call.”

(I step outside to answer the call.)

Yuri: “Hello?”

Ayano: (in the dance studio, rubbing Kokana’s massive triplet bump) “Hey, Yuri. Long time no talk.”

Yuri: “Ayano, it’s nice to hear from you. How have you been?”

Ayano: “I’ve been good. Busy with the dance studio lately. Kokona wants to talk, too.”

(Kokona grabs the phone from Ayano.)

Kokona: “Hello, Yuri!”

Yuri: “Hey, Kokona! How are you feeling?”

Kokona: “Well, I’m a little tired, but otherwise good. The babies are moving around a lot.”

Yuri: “Oh, that’s good to hear. How many weeks are you now?”

Kokona: “I’m at 36 weeks now, so it won’t be long until they’re here. But…I heard from one of the others that Musume isn’t feeling so good.”

Yuri: “Oh no, what’s wrong with her?”

Kokona: “I’m not quite sure. But I wanted you to know, in case you wanted to check in on her.”

Yuri: “Thank you for letting me know, Kokona. I’ll make sure to check on her right away.”

Kokona: “Great, thanks. And take care of yourself, too.”

Yuri: “I will. Talk to you soon.”

(I hang up the phone and head back inside the room.)

Yuri: “Hey, guys. Sorry about that.”

Sayori: “No worries, Yuri. Is everything okay?”

Yuri: “Yeah, it was just a call from a friend. But on a different note, I heard that Musume isn’t feeling well.”

Natsuki: “Oh no, what’s wrong with her?”

Yuri: “I’m not sure, but I think I should go check on her.”

Monika: “Of course, Yuri. We’ll take care of things here.”

Sayori: “Thank you, Yuri. And please let us know if there’s anything we can do to help.”

Yuri: “Will do. See you all later.”

(I quickly head out the door and make my way to Musume’s house. As I arrive at Musume’s house, I notice that she’s sitting on the couch, holding her massive belly in pain.)

Yuri: “Musume, are you okay?”

Musume: (groaning) “Y-yeah…I’m just having some cramps.”

Yuri: “Do you need me to call a doctor or someone to help?”

Musume: “No, it’s okay. It’s not that serious.”

Yuri: “Musume, please don’t try to brush it off. I’m worried about you.”

Musume: (sighing) “Okay, you’re right. I just didn’t want to bother anyone.”

Yuri: “You’re not bothering anyone, Musume. We’re all here to support each other. Let me call a doctor for you.”

(I quickly call a doctor who comes to check on Musume.)

(I still missed my old friends back before I joined the literature club. Ayano always calmed my nerves when I went crazy for boys, and feeling Kokona’s triplets move around was exhilarating. Just then, I got a phone call - it was Kokona!)

Kokona: “Hey, Yuri! Long time no talk!”

(I was thrilled to hear Kokona’s voice again. Even though it’s been 10 months since Kokona got pregnant, I could hear several things that indicated she was in the delivery room.)

Yuri: “Kokona! Oh wow, it’s so good to hear from you! How have you been? And… are you in the delivery room?”

Kokona: “Yeah, you know me, always multitasking! The doctors say it’s almost time for me to give birth. I just wanted to take a moment to catch up with you before the big moment.”

Yuri: “That’s incredible, Kokona! I’m so excited for you. How have you been feeling throughout your pregnancy? Is everything going well?”

Kokona: “Thank you, Yuri! Overall, it’s been quite the journey. There have been ups and downs, moments of joy and moments of discomfort. But knowing that I’ll soon be holding my little ones in my arms makes it all worth it. And feeling the triplets move around inside me is the most amazing feeling.”

Yuri: “I can imagine. It must be such a unique experience to carry three lives within you. I’m really happy for you, Kokona. You’ve always been so caring and loving, and I have no doubt you’ll be a wonderful mother.”

Kokona: “Aw, thank you, Yuri. That means a lot to me. I hope I can live up to your expectations. Oh, by the way, have you been doing well since we last saw each other? How’s life at the literature club?”

Yuri: “Life at the literature club has been… interesting. It’s been a great opportunity for me to explore my love for literature and creativity. The other girls are amazing, and we’ve become quite a close-knit group. But I have to admit, I do miss spending time with my old friends like you and Ayano. You two always had a way of calming my nerves and understanding me.”

Kokona: “I understand, Yuri. Change can be difficult, and it’s natural to miss what we once had. But remember, friendships can evolve and grow, even if we’re not physically together. Just because we’re not in the same place doesn’t mean we can’t still support each other.”

Yuri: “You’re right, Kokona. I shouldn’t let distance or change diminish the value of our friendship. I’m really grateful to have you in my life, even if we don’t see each other as often. And I’m always here for you, no matter what.”

Kokona: “That means the world to me, Yuri. Thank you for being such an amazing friend. And don’t worry, once things settle down a bit with the babies, we’ll definitely find a way to catch up properly. Speaking of which, I think the first triplet is about to arrive!”

Yuri: “Oh my goodness, Kokona! That’s so exciting! Take deep breaths and stay calm, you’re going to do great. I’ll be sending you all my positive thoughts and well wishes.”

Kokona: “Thank you, Yuri. I really appreciate it. I’ll keep you updated on everything. And don’t worry, I’ll make sure to save a special moment for when we can meet up and properly catch up. I’m sure the babies would love to meet Aunt Yuri.”

Yuri: “Aunt Yuri, I like the sound of that. Please give the little ones a gentle pat for me. I can’t wait to hear all about them and their unique personalities. You’re going to be an amazing mom, Kokona. I just know it.”

Kokona: “Thank you so much, Yuri. Your support means everything to me. I’ll make sure to keep you involved in this journey every step of the way. And remember, even though things might change, our friendship will always hold a special place in my heart.”

Yuri: “And mine too, Kokona. No matter what happens, our bond will remain strong. Take care of yourself and those beautiful little ones. I’ll be eagerly waiting to hear all the wonderful news. Good luck, Kokona. You’ve got this.”

Kokona: “Thank you, Yuri. You’re the best. I’ll talk to you soon, okay?”

Yuri: “Definitely, Kokona. Looking forward to it. Take care of yourself and stay strong. Sending lots of love your way.”

(With a final exchange of well wishes and reassurances, Kokona and I hung up the phone. I couldn’t help but feel a mix of emotions - excitement for Kokona and the upcoming arrival of the triplets, but also a longing for the familiarity of my old friendships. Nevertheless, I knew that even though things had changed, the bonds of friendship remained strong. And when I arrived at the clubroom, I saw somebody I didn’t expect - it was Ayano! She was talking to Monika, Sayori, and Natsuki - almost as if she wanted to join the literature club, even though Natsuki looked around 7 months pregnant. I couldn’t believe it - for the first time ever since MC’s death, I felt overjoyed to meet my old friend again.)

Ayano: “Yuri! It’s been so long, I’ve missed you!”

Yuri: “Ayano! I can’t believe it’s really you. I’ve missed you too!”

(Ayano and I hugged tightly, both of us holding back tears of joy.)

Ayano: “I’ve been wanting to come back and see you all for a while now. Life has been really tough since MC’s passing, but I’ve realized that isolating myself isn’t the answer. I need my friends, I need you, Yuri.”

Yuri: “I’m so glad you reached that realization, Ayano. We’ve all been worried about you. But I’m really proud of you for taking this step. And let me just say, you have no idea how much we’ve missed you.”

Monika: “Ayano, it’s such a pleasant surprise to see you here. The literature club isn’t the same without you. We would love for you to join us again.”

Ayano: “Thank you, Monika. I would love to join the literature club again. I’ve really missed our discussions and activities.”

Sayori: “Ayano, I’m so happy you’re back! We missed your calming presence and unique insights. Plus, we need your help with planning our next club activity. It’s going to be so much fun!”

Natsuki: “Yeah, yeah! It’s about time you came back, Ayano. Nobody else can beat you in our manga debates. Welcome back to the literature club!”

Ayano: “Thank you all so much for welcoming me back with open arms. It means the world to me. I’ve missed you guys more than I can express.”

(As the club members continued to chat and catch up, I couldn’t help but feel an overwhelming sense of happiness and gratitude. It was as if a piece of my heart that had been missing for so long had finally returned. Despite the ups and downs we had all experienced, our bond as friends had remained strong.)

Yuri: “Welcome back, Ayano. I’m so glad to have you here with us again. Let’s create beautiful memories together, just like old times.”

Ayano: “Thank you, Yuri. I’m excited to make new memories with you all. Let’s treasure our friendship and the precious moments we share.”

(With the reunion of Ayano and the renewed bond between us, I knew that no matter what challenges lay ahead, we would always have each other for support. The literature club, now complete once again, was ready to embrace the future and continue growing together. After some time, all of us went to see Kokona in the hospital - she had finally given birth to the triplets. As we entered Kokona’s hospital room, we were greeted by the sight of three tiny bundles wrapped in soft blankets. Kokona herself looked tired but radiant, a proud smile on her face.)

Kokona: “Hey, everyone! Come meet my little miracles.”

(Ayano, Monika, Sayori, Natsuki, and I gathered around Kokona’s bed, each of us taking turns in holding one of the babies. They were delicate and precious, their tiny fingers and toes captivating us all.)

Monika: “They’re absolutely adorable, Kokona. Congratulations! What are their names?”

Kokona: “Thank you, Monika. Well, this little guy here is Kazuki, and the two girls are Hana and Sakura. I wanted their names to reflect their individuality and beauty.”

Ayano: “Those names are perfect, Kokona. They suit them so well.”

Sayori: “Look at their tiny little faces! They’re like little angels.”

Natsuki: “Wow, being an aunt is going to be so much fun now that I have three new nieces and nephews!”

Yuri: “They’re truly blessings, Kokona. I’m so happy for you. They already have such loving and strong-hearted parents.”

Kokona: “Thank you, everyone. I can’t express how grateful I am to have you all here with me. You’ve been there for me through thick and thin, and now you’re here to celebrate this joyous moment with me.”

(We spent the rest of the afternoon in Kokona’s hospital room, talking, laughing, and sharing stories. The triplets were peacefully sleeping, their presence bringing a sense of tranquility to the room. It was a beautiful reminder of the power of friendship and the enduring bond we shared.)

Ayano: “Kokona, thank you for allowing us to be a part of this special day. The triplets are lucky to have you as their mother.”

Kokona: “No, thank you, Ayano. And thank you all. I couldn’t have asked for better friends. You’ve been my rock throughout this journey, and I know you’ll continue to be there for me and my little ones.”

Monika: “That’s what friends are for, Kokona. We’ll always be here, supporting and loving you. And now, these little ones too.”

Sayori: “Yeah, we’re like one big family, right? The four of us may not be related by blood, but our bond is just as strong.”

Natsuki: “Agreed. And with Ayano back, our family is complete once more.”

Yuri: “Let’s cherish our friendship, both old and new, and the beautiful connections we’ve formed in the literature club. Together, we can create a future filled with love, support, and endless memories.”

(The room filled with warmth and love as we continued to celebrate the arrival of the triplets and the rekindling of our friendship. But then I noticed that there were about five babies moving inside Natsuki’s belly.)

Yuri: “Natsuki, are you… expecting too?”

Natsuki: “Surprise! Yeah, I found out a few weeks ago that I’m pregnant too! Looks like these little ones couldn’t wait to join the party.”

Ayano: “That’s incredible, Natsuki! Congratulations! I guess the literature club will be filled with even more tiny members now. But…how many babies are moving around in there?”

Natsuki: “Haha, I know, right? It’s a bit overwhelming, but I couldn’t be happier. Turns out, I’m expecting quintuplets!”

Everyone: “Quintuplets?!”

Natsuki: “Yeah, I was just as shocked when I found out. But it’s an absolute blessing, and I can’t wait to meet all five of them.”

Ayano: “That’s amazing, Natsuki! We’re so happy for you.”

Monika: “Congratulations, Natsuki. This is going to be quite an adventure.”

Sayori: “Wow, Natsuki, you’re going to have your hands full. But I know you’ll be an amazing mom.”

Yuri: “Five little ones, Natsuki. That’s incredible. I can’t wait to see them all and spoil them with love.”

Natsuki: “Thank you, everyone. I’m a little nervous, but knowing that I have all of you by my side makes it easier. And hey, the more, the merrier, right?”

(As the afternoon continued, we enveloped Natsuki in a warm embrace, expressing our excitement and support for the journey ahead. The literature club had grown even bigger, and our bond as friends had only strengthened. Little did we know, these new additions to our group would bring even more joy and love into our lives. And after several days, it was finally time for Natsuki to have the quintuplets.)

MC: “Who could be knocking on the door now?”

MC: “Hey, Natsuki!”

Natsuki: “What are you talking about? This is what I really am.”

MC: “But…but how? You were just a regular girl before.”

Natsuki: “Would you like to meet my triplet daughters?”

MC: “Wait, triplet daughters? Natsuki, this is all so unexpected! But yes, I would love to meet them!”

(Natsuki smiles brightly and waves a hand towards the hallway. Three little girls, each with a glowing halo and tiny angel wings, come skipping into the room. They have playful expressions and look just like mini versions of Natsuki.)

Daughter #1: “Hello, MC! I’m Seraphina!”

Daughter #2: “Hi there! I’m Celestia!”

Daughter #3: “Hey, MC! I’m Aurora!”

MC: “Wow, it’s amazing to meet all of you! Your wings are so beautiful, just like your mother’s.”

(Natsuki blushes, clearly proud of her daughters. Seraphina, Celestia, and Aurora look at each other mischievously before bursting into laughter.)

Natsuki: “They definitely inherited my mischievousness! They’ve been exploring their angelic powers and causing all sorts of laughter and joy wherever they go.”

MC: “That sounds absolutely wonderful! But Natsuki, I can’t help but wonder, how was the birthing process for you?”

Natsuki: “Well, I don’t remember that much. But I still remember the day we first met, MC, back when I was 9 months pregnant…”

{FLASHBACK - MC AND NATSUKI FIRST MEET}

Natsuki: (talking to her belly, her halo glowing with golden light) “It’s almost time, little ones! I can’t wait to meet you three!”

MC: (walking into the room) “Who are you talking to, miss?”

Natsuki: (glancing up) “What the-?! Who are you?!”

MC: “Oh, I’m sorry if I startled you. I didn’t mean to intrude. I’m MC, a friend of Yuri’s. She told me I could come here to borrow a book.”

Natsuki: (slightly flustered) “O-oh, I see - you’re friends with that talking zombie girl that doesn’t eat brains. Well, I’m Natsuki. Nice to meet you, MC. Sorry about my reaction… I’m just a bit on edge with the babies coming soon.”

MC: “It’s alright, Natsuki. I completely understand. Pregnancy can be a stressful time. It must be exciting, though, to be welcoming triplets.”

Natsuki: (smiling softly) “Yeah, it is. I never imagined becoming a mom so young, but I’ve come to embrace it. I’ve always loved kids, so having three little angels on the way is both daunting and amazing…especially since I’m an angel myself.”

MC: “Wait, you’re an angel? Now I’m starting to feel left out.”

Natsuki: (laughs) “Don’t worry, MC, I’m sure there’s something special about you too. Being an angel is just a part of who I am, but it doesn’t make me any better or worse than anyone else-” (her eyes widen in shock) “…oh my god…”

MC: “What’s wrong, Natsuki? Did something happen?”

Natsuki: “I-I think my water’s starting to break!”

MC: “Oh no, Natsuki! We need to get you to the hospital right away!”

Natsuki: “But…what if my water breaks fully while on the way there?!”

MC: “Don’t worry, Natsuki! We’ll figure it out. Just take deep breaths and try to stay calm.”

Natsuki: “Okay…okay, I’ll try. But I’m so scared, MC.”

MC: “I know it’s scary, Natsuki. But you’re not alone. I’ll be right here with you every step of the way. We’ll get through this together.”

Natsuki: “Thank you, MC. I’m glad you’re here.”

MC: “Alright, let’s quickly grab your things and head to the car. We’ll call an ambulance on the way, just in case.”

Natsuki: “Okay, let’s go.”

(MC and Natsuki rush out of the room, making their way to the car. Natsuki is in discomfort, but MC does their best to keep her calm throughout the journey to the hospital. But just before they exit the house, Natsuki’s water breaks fully.)

Natsuki: “Oh my god! I-I-It’s happening!” (she starts pushing as soon as she feels a contraction) “AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!”

MC: “Wait, already?! Hang on, let me call for an ambulance!”

Natsuki: “No time, MC! The first baby’s already coming out!”

MC: “Okay, just stay calm and push when your wings start fluttering - that’s when you know you’re having a contraction.”

Summarize in up to four sentences.: Bank of Canada says interest rates may not be high enough to tame inflation
Steve Scherer and David Ljunggren
Thu, September 7, 2023 at 2:00 p.m. EDT·3 min read

Bank of Canada Governor Tiff Macklem takes part in a news conference after announcing an interest rate decision in Ottawa
By Steve Scherer and David Ljunggren

OTTAWA (Reuters) -Bank of Canada Governor Tiff Macklem on Thursday said interest rates may not be high enough to bring inflation back down to target, sending a hawkish message after holding borrowing costs at a 22-year high a day earlier.

The Bank of Canada (BoC) on Wednesday kept its key rate at 5%, noting the economy had entered a period of weaker growth, but said it could hike again should price pressures persist. Inflation has remained above the bank's 2% target for 27 months.

Macklem, in a speech to the chamber of commerce in Calgary, Alberta, said one possible reason for inflation staying above target was it might be taking longer for rates to work, but the other possibility "is that monetary policy is not yet restrictive enough to restore price stability."

He added: "And unfortunately, the longer we wait, the harder it's likely to be to reduce inflation."

The central bank hiked rates by a quarter point in both June and July in a bid to tame stubbornly high inflation. However Macklem said that now "there is little downward momentum to underlying inflation."

Canada's gross domestic product unexpectedly shrank an annualized 0.2% in the second quarter, a sign the economy could have already entered a recession as higher rates sink in. But inflation accelerated in July to 3.3% and core measures remained at about 3.5%.

"I don't think we're in a recession," Macklem told reporters after his speech. "We're expecting low positive growth."

The governor also said monetary policy had been working and the inflation target is now "in sight".

"Maybe we don't need to do more, but maybe we do," he said.

The Canadian dollar was trading 0.3% lower at 1.3678 to the greenback, or 73.11 U.S. cents, after touching its weakest point in five months at 1.3694.

"Officials will remain highly vigilant and attuned to any changes in the direction of the economy and inflation," said Royce Mendes, head of macro strategy at Desjardins Group.

The tone of Macklem's speech clashed with the message coming from Canadian politicians in recent days. Before the Wednesday rate decision, three provincial premiers wrote to Macklem urging him to hold rates.

Finance Minister Chrystia Freeland, after the announcement on Wednesday, made a rare public comment on monetary policy, calling it "a welcome relief for Canadians."

When asked whether the minister's comments were appropriate, Macklem did not answer directly.

Freeland has made "very clear that she fully respects the independence of the Bank of Canada," he said.

While Macklem did note the economy had been slowing since overheating in the first half of 2022, and that slower growth helped ease price pressures, he stressed the importance of getting inflation all the way down to the 2% target.

"Going forward, we will be looking for further evidence that price pressures are easing," Macklem said.

Money markets see a 14% chance for a rate hike when the bank next meets in late October.

(Reporting by Steve Scherer and David Ljunggren; Additional reporting by Fergal Smith in Toronto; Editing by Mark Porter and Diane Craft)
